subcodes.first_line: Say: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I beseech Thee by the ocean of Thy knowledge, the heaven of Thy bounty, and the sun of Thy grace, to make me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قل سبحانک اللهم یا الهی اسئلک ببحر علمک و سماء جودک و شمس عطائک بان تجعلنی
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @knowledge; recognition of God
